tools.name: get_user_context
tools.description: Resolve the current Nara user, assistant personality, access state, task summary, and user-specific agent instructions. Call this before other tools.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value such as WhatsApp phone number (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a user-scoped task. Respect assistantProfile.autonomy and include confirmed=true only after confirmation when required.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.title: string (required)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks scoped to the resolved Nara user.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a user-scoped task as done by its ID. List tasks first if the user does not provide an ID.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
parameters.confirmed: boolean (required when user autonomy requires confirmation)

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete a user-scoped task by ID. Always confirm with the user before calling.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Get a user-scoped summary: pending task count, overdue count, and next due task.

parameters.userId: UUID string (optional when contactValue is provided)
parameters.contactValue: sender contact value (optional when userId is provided)
